What We Do

Four services. Done right, every time.

Every job below is work we've done on properties just like yours — real results, not stock photos.

Mowing & Maintenance

Weekly care that keeps your lawn looking sharp

Consistent, scheduled mowing and upkeep so your lawn stays healthy and neat all season — clean lines, no missed weeks.

  • Weekly or bi-weekly mowing schedules
  • Edging, trimming & cleanup
  • Seasonal lawn upkeep
Mulch & Decorative Stone

Beds that frame your property properly

Fresh mulch and decorative stone installs that clean up your beds, suppress weeds, and give your landscaping a finished look.

  • Mulch delivery & installation
  • Decorative stone beds
  • Bed edging & refresh
Hardscaping

Patios and stonework built to last

Paver patios and hardscape features designed and installed for the long haul — built on a solid base, laid right the first time.

  • Paver patios & walkways
  • Retaining & garden walls
  • Base prep & drainage done properly
Tree Removal

Safe removal & land clearing

From single tree removal to clearing storm damage and overgrowth, we handle it safely with the right equipment for the job.

  • Tree & limb removal
  • Land clearing
  • Debris hauling & cleanup
Where We Work

Based in Hancock, serving the whole Monadnock region

Evan Ainsworth Landscaping is rooted in Hancock, NH and works properties throughout the surrounding towns. Not sure if you're in range? Reach out — we're happy to check.
